title: Cognitive Complexity of coroutines should not be too high
description: "Cognitive complexity" is a measure of how hard the control flow of a function is to understand. Code with high cognitive complexity is hard to read, understand, test, and modify. This rule raises on coroutines with high cognitive complexity.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Cognitive Complexity of coroutines should not be too high.
